proposed_relations.description: Bus lanes on Hylan Boulevard are part of the S79 Select Bus Service launch

evidence_refs.source_quote: S79 SELECT BUS SERVICE BEGINS SEPTEMBER 2, 2012
2. Bus lanes at key locations bring faster and more reliable service to all bus riders.
▪ On Hylan Boulevard between Lincoln Avenue and Steuben Street. ▪ On Richmond Avenue between Platinum Avenue & Forest Hill Road. ▪ On Richmond Avenue between Shirley Avenue & Hylan Boulevard.

decisions.rationale: The flyer lists bus lanes on Hylan Boulevard as improvement #2 under 'IMPROVEMENTS COMING SEPTEMBER 2ND' for the S79 Select Bus Service launch, and detail blocks p002_c0017/p002_c0018 confirm location and hours.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ On Hylan Boulevard between Lincoln Avenue and Steuben Street. ▪ On Richmond Avenue between Platinum Avenue & Forest Hill Road. ▪ On Richmond Avenue between Shirley Avenue & Hylan Boulevard.
Bus lanes on Hylan Boulevard
▪ Between Lincoln Avenue and Steuben Street ▪ In effect on weekdays from 6-9am northbound and 3-7pm southbound
